name: @awesome-codex-theme/theme-manager
description: Cross-platform Codex Native theme manager for Awesome Codex Theme.

scripts.check: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare:assets && tauri build --bundles nsis
scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare:assets && tauri build --bundles dmg
scripts.build:win:release: npm run prepare:assets && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --bundles nsis
scripts.build:mac:release: npm run prepare:assets && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.release.conf.json --bundles dmg

author: Awesome Codex Theme contributors
